subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth and guideth mankind unto the straight path which God hath made manifest in His Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و یهدی الناس الی الصراط المستقیم الذی اظهره الله فی یومه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
